title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.13 - Vigor (and Strength/Dexterity) now show Invertible + Swappable in tooltips (e.g. on Forte); Unweak/Unvulnerable/Unfrail now show Swappable; every buff/debuff inversion pair is now consistently both-swappable or both-non-swappable.
